\tzpentry{ID5522}{Phase Angle Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5522 introduces Phase Angle Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g(\theta,\phi) = \sum_k a_k \Re\!\left( Y_{\ell_k m_k}(\theta,\phi) \right), \end{equation}
